race.comment: KILONOVA (2) hasn't raced since finishing sixth over 1200m at Eagle Farm on January 7 and has since switched yards. Goes well when fresh with a win and a minor placing from three starts and is sure to go well. PAST MIDNIGHT (3) impressed when successful as favourite on debut over 800m at Warwick two-and-a-half weeks ago. Will come on following that run and looks tough to hold out again. FULLY SUBSCRIBED (5) ran below expectations last time at Thangool, finishing tenth and beaten 22 lengths starting at $10. It doesn't get any easier but on her best form she is capable of a much better performance. SKY BLUE (6) returns from a layoff of four-and-a-half months. Worth noting she filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last prep over 1000m at this track. One to consider while fresh.
